summary: Council's invitation-to-tender pack following the May market engagement (CR-2026-033): mandatory contract terms (38 pages), no-negotiation notice, and a compliance questionnaire. Submission deadline 2026-07-31.
senders_ask: Please confirm we can accept their terms as-is — tender doesn't allow redlines.
name: Tender Terms & Conditions — Oakhampton Council
review_state: awaiting first review — no triage, no edits
